title: Candy Frenzy 2021
description: New innovative candy game comes! Objectives differ in over 100 levels. Make matches of 3 or more candies, create candy blasts! Starts out simple, but things get more and more interesting and challenging. Start your sweet candy journey in this puzzle adventure!
instructions: Sweet and shining candies Over 100 interesting levels Multiple game goals time mode move mode and more Very small size but tasty graphics Create a high score in your friends circle
